headline: Is M&T Bank Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: M&T Bank has outperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, and analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: HEICO Corporation Increases Credit Facility to $2.2 Billion
